prompt: [PROMPT: COMPLEX DYNAMIC WHITENED ISOMETRIC ILLUSTRATION] A dynamic, complex isometric illustration with clean black outlines and soft-cell shading, in the 'Whitened Dynamic Conceptual' style. A large isometric 2x2 grid matrix floats in the center of the composition on a light gray #EEEEEE background. The matrix has two axes clearly labeled: the horizontal axis (top) represents Disclosure (知らせる / Don't share), and the vertical axis (left) represents Autonomy (任せる / Don't delegate). Each axis has two states creating four quadrant cells. Top-left cell: a neutral White #FFFFFF isometric cube with a matte black silhouette figure standing alone, hands at sides, no AI elements — representing 'No AI involvement'. Top-right cell: a Blue #6C82FE tinted isometric platform with the same silhouette figure, but now a small floating Blue #6C82FE lightbulb icon hovers nearby with a thin connecting line — representing 'Suggests only'. Bottom-left cell (the key cell): a Pink #FC6978 tinted isometric platform, visually broken and fragmented, with bold diagonal Pink #FC6978 strikethrough lines crossing the entire cell. A large #111111 X mark sits in the center. Small broken gear icons and disconnected wires float around it — representing 'Impossible: cannot automate what is unknown'. Bottom-right cell: an Orange #F59400 and White #FFFFFF isometric platform, vibrant and complete, with a silhouette figure relaxed while a small Blue #6C82FE robot figure operates controls on a floating dashboard with Orange #F59400 indicator lights — representing 'Auto-execute: AI knows and acts'. A bold Orange #F59400 arrow flows from the top-right cell down to the bottom-right cell, suggesting the progression path. A second thin Blue #6C82FE arrow flows from the bottom-left cell to the bottom-right cell with a small padlock icon transitioning from closed (Pink #FC6978) to open (Orange #F59400). All elements have precise #111111 outlines. Shading is soft-cell, no gradients. Extensive light gray #EEEEEE background space creating airiness. Element White #FFFFFF used strategically throughout to create cleanliness and light within the design.
